drl:
rule "R2"
agenda-group "ga"
when
    $p : T0()
then
    insert(new T1(3.5, $p.getF1(), false, true));
end
rule "R3"
salience -3
no-loop
when
    T1($x : f3)
    T0($y : f0)
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
end
name: bd_e1
_finding: lane-2 axis: eager no-loop HETERO-join receiver (T1 x T0), same one-rule-two-firings ga inserter. Tests whether the eager-flush skip needs the self-join or bites any eager join receiver.
